description: Slip those tiny feet of your little one into unparalleled comfort in this pair of floaters from disney. With ample grip and cushioning provided, it's a pair your little one would never want to step out of.UpperSynthetic leather upper with velcro closure straps on the forefoot and midfoot, and has a study backfoot strap to offer a customised FitFabric inner cushioning for the strapsTextured PU footbed for absolute grip and impact protectionDaisy Duck applique on the forefoot strap for styleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategically placed suction lugs to offer ample grip on all surfacesFlaoter careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
